html:
2026-0655
2026-06-22INFCFinancial Administration ActOrder Authorizing the Canada Lands Company Limited to incorporate new subsidiaryOrder Authorizing the Canada Lands Company Limited (CLCL) to incorporate new subsidiary in order to (1) procure the incorporation of a wholly- owned subsidiary that has yet to be named to carry out activities and perform functions in support of the mandate of CLCL, including with respect to the CN Tower, all the shares of which, on incorporation, would be held by, on behalf of or in trust for the CLCL; and (2) acquire shares of the wholly-owned subsidiary that, on acquisition, would be held by, on behalf of or in trust for CLCL.N/A
subject: Order Authorizing the Canada Lands Company Limited to incorporate new subsidiary
precis: Order Authorizing the Canada Lands Company Limited (CLCL) to incorporate new subsidiary in order to (1) procure the incorporation of a wholly- owned subsidiary that has yet to be named to carry out activities and perform functions in support of the mandate of CLCL, including with respect to the CN Tower, all the shares of which, on incorporation, would be held by, on behalf of or in trust for the CLCL; and (2) acquire shares of the wholly-owned subsidiary that, on acquisition, would be held by, on behalf of or in trust for CLCL.
